mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_SHORT_NAME, CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE, INVOICE, TIN, BANK, BANK_ACCOUNT, ADDRESS, TELEPHONE_NUMBER, CONTACT, CONTACT_NUMBER, CONTACT_ADDRESS, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, APPROVAL_BY, APPROVAL_NAME, APPROVAL_TIME, SHORTHAND_CODE,IS_CREDIT,CUSTOMER_NAME_EAS,CUSTOMER_CODE_EAS,TAXATION_INVOICE,TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE, IS_STATIONS,DAY_NIGHT_PLAN_CONTROL FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_SHORT_NAME, CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE, INVOICE, TIN, BANK, BANK_ACCOUNT, ADDRESS, TELEPHONE_NUMBER, CONTACT, CONTACT_NUMBER, CONTACT_ADDRESS, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, APPROVAL_BY, APPROVAL_NAME, APPROVAL_TIME, SHORTHAND_CODE,CUSTOMER_NAME_EAS,CUSTOMER_CODE_EAS FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER
BHT_ID = #{bhtId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CUSTOMER( ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_SHORT_NAME, CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE, INVOICE, TIN, BANK, BANK_ACCOUNT, ADDRESS, TELEPHONE_NUMBER, CONTACT, CONTACT_NUMBER, CONTACT_ADDRESS, STATUS, REMARK, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_NAMES, shorthand_Code, APPROVAL_BY, APPROVAL_NAME, APPROVAL_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, BHT_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME_EAS, CUSTOMER_CODE_EAS, TAXATION_INVOICE, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerShortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bank, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{telephoneNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contact, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerPropertyNames, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shorthandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{approvalName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, BUS_CUSTOMER.nextval, #{customerNameEas, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerCodeEas, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxationInvoice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxationInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CUSTOMER SET CUSTOMER_CODE = #{customerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_SHORT_NAME = #{customerShortName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE = #{customerTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE = #{invoice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TIN = #{tin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK = #{bank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_ACCOUNT = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDRESS = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TELEPHONE_NUMBER = #{telephoneNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTACT = #{contact,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTACT_NUMBER = #{contactNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTACT_ADDRESS = #{contactAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDEA = #{idea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_NAME_EAS = #{customerNameEas,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_CODE_EAS = #{customerCodeEas,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAXATION_INVOICE = #{taxationInvoice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE = #{taxationInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_NAMES = #{customerPropertyNames, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVAL_BY = #{approvalBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, APPROVAL_NAME = #{approvalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVAL_TIME = #{approvalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, shorthand_Code = #{shorthandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_CUSTOMER SET IDEA = #{idea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVAL_BY = #{approvalBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, APPROVAL_NAME = #{approvalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVAL_TIME = #{approvalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_CUSTOMER SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER WHERE BHT_ID = #{bhtId} ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CUSTOMER_NAME FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER WHERE BHT_ID = #{bhtId} ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_SHORT_NAME FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER
id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CUSTOMER SET IS_CREDIT = #{isCredit,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
